name: Frosty Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and salt until well mixed.
2. Add the buttermilk and vanilla extract, stirring to ensure everything is incorporated.
3. Gently fold in the drained pineapple and fruit cocktail.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch square pan.
5. Freeze until firm.
